title: Home prices expected to drop, but homebuilders remain strong
text: Some economists and housing analysts say home prices will likely decline soon, just as existing home inventory is rising. According to November 22 data from real estate platform Redfin, median sale prices are declining in several U.S. metro areas, including Austin, San Antonio and Fort Worth in Texas, along with Portland, Oregon.

title: NVR: A Deep Dive Into This Phenomenal Homebuilder
text: NVR is the largest homebuilder on the US East Coast and has consistently generated profit every year since 1993. The company has outperformed its peers with a compounded annual growth rate of over 30% and is built to thrive in downturns. Studying NVR will provide insights into market leaders in adjacent markets and help understand the opportunities and challenges in the homebuilding industry.

title: NVR, INC. ANNOUNCES SHARE REPURCHASE AUTHORIZATION
text: RESTON, Va. , Nov. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- NVR, Inc. (NYSE: NVR) announced today that its Board of Directors has authorized the repurchase of up to an aggregate of $750 million of its outstanding common stock.
